heading: PUBLICATIONS
description: As a passionate explorer of the intersection between technology and innovation, I have delved into various research endeavors that have culminated in insightful publications.For me, a research paper isn't just a document; it is a field report from the front lines of technical discoveryWorking alongside my fellow researchers, I bridge the gap between theoretical analysis and structural design.

papers.title: Exploring Microcode CPU Instructions with RISC-V Breadboard Computer
